description_long: This is a decorative flag attached to a long, slender wooden pole. The flag itself is rectangular with a notched end and features a green background adorned with a white and purple emblem resembling a stylized animal or mythical creature. The flag is bordered with a darker green trim and has three circular grommets along the hoist edge for attachment to the pole. The pole appears to be made of wood with a pointed metal tip at the bottom, suggesting it could be staked into the ground. The flag's fabric has a matte finish and appears to be in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A green notched flag with a white and purple emblem, mounted on a long wooden pole with a pointed metal tip. The flag is bordered and attached with grommets, appearing pristine and decorative.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden pole and the notched green flag with its emblem clearly visible.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thickness of the flag and the three grommets securing it to the pole.
description_view_2: Reverse side view showing the back of the flag and the pole, with the notched end and emblem partially visible.
description_view_3: View from the pole's tip, emphasizing the pointed metal end and the flag extending perpendicularly.
attribute_flag_design: Green rectangular flag with a notched fly end, bordered in dark green, featuring a white and purple stylized animal or mythical creature emblem at the center. Three circular grommets line the hoist edge for attachment.
attribute_mounting_type: vertical wooden pole with pointed metal tip
